children.heading: Alaska natural gas
children.label: 1 Alaska natural gas
children.text: The term “Alaska natural gas” means natural gas derived from the area of the State of Alaska lying north of 64 degrees north latitude.

children.label: A
children.text: the Alaska Natural Gas Transportation Act of 1976 ( et seq.); or15 U.S.C. 719

children.heading: Alaska natural gas transportation system
children.label: 3 Alaska natural gas transportation system
children.text: The term “Alaska natural gas transportation system” means the Alaska natural gas transportation project authorized under the Alaska Natural Gas Transportation Act of 1976 ( et seq.) and designated and described in section 2 of the President’s decision.15 U.S.C. 719

children.heading: Commission
children.label: 4 Commission
children.text: The term “Commission” means the Federal Energy Regulatory Commission.

children.heading: Federal Coordinator
children.label: 5 Federal Coordinator
children.text: The term “Federal Coordinator” means the head of the Office of the Federal Coordinator for Alaska Natural Gas Transportation Projects established by .section 720d(a) of this title

children.label: A
children.text: issued by the President on , in accordance with section 7 of the Alaska Natural Gas Transportation Act of 1976 (); andSeptember 22, 197715 U.S.C. 719e

children.label: B
children.text: approved by ( note; ).Public Law 95–15815 U.S.C. 719f91 Stat. 1268

children.heading: Secretary
children.label: 7 Secretary
children.text: The term “Secretary” means the Secretary of Energy.

children.heading: State
children.label: 8 State
children.text: The term “State” means the State of Alaska.
